exam_format: Computer-based at testing center; most states allow NEC codebook reference.

testing_centers.provider: PSI Exams and Pearson VUE authorized centers; some state DOL offices
testing_centers.notes: Most state electrician exams are administered at PSI Exams or Pearson VUE authorized testing centers. Some states administer exams at Department of Labor offices. Online proctoring is not available.

exam_rules: Open-book for NEC code book in most states; approved calculator permitted; government-issued photo ID required.
renewal_options: License renewal every 2-3 years; continuing education hours required (typically 8-16 hours per renewal cycle); NEC code updates every 3 years may require re-examination.

retake_policy.notes: Varies by state; typically 30-day wait between attempts, maximum 3-5 attempts per year depending on state.
